positive: A stylized, central composition illustration of a whimsical woodland forest scene. The main subject features glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, meandering roots, and various types of stylized, elegant foliage. Incorporate gentle silhouettes of curious woodland animals (rabbits, deer, foxes) peeking through the leaves. Use a high-contrast, deep emerald green and sapphire blue color palette, accented with pops of neon yellow and soft lavender glow. The style should be a blend of detailed botanical illustration and modern fantasy graphic design, ensuring strong line work and crisp edges for print. The composition must be designed for a central wearable art piece, featuring negative space that allows for clear garment printing. Cinematic overhead lighting to emphasize the glowing elements, with strong rim lighting defining the silhouettes. Vector art aesthetic, graphic novel quality, perfectly rendered.
